name: RS-9
subtitle: Rhythm Sequencer & Trigger Brain
inspiration: RD-9 sequencer engine in Eurorack form
summary: 10-track step sequencer with up to 64 steps per track. Each track outputs trigger and accent CV, plus a global pitch/CV out, MIDI DIN, USB-C, and clock I/O. Memory for 256 patterns and 16 songs, with probability, swing, ratchets, flam, note repeat, and polyrhythms.
